debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2) = exp (b ^ 2) - exp (a ^ 2)

proof:
apply integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt
  · intro x _
    convert (hasDerivAt_pow 2 x).exp using 1
    ring
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity
failed_attempts:
apply integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt
  · intro x _
    apply HasDerivAt.exp
    simpa using hasDerivAt_pow 2 x
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    exact (continuous_const.mul continuous_id).mul (continuous_exp.comp (continuous_pow 2))

rw [← integral_deriv_eq_sub' (f := fun x ↦ exp (x ^ 2)) (f' := fun x ↦ 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2))]
  · intro x _
    convert ((hasDerivAt_id x).pow 2).exp using 1
    ring
  · continuity

    ring

  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable

apply integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun x _ ↦ by simpa using (hasDerivAt_pow 2 x).exp)

apply integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun x _ ↦ ?_)

apply integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt
  · intro x _
    have h : HasDerivAt (fun x ↦ x ^ 2) (2 * x) x := by simpa using hasDerivAt_pow 2 x
    rw [show 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2) = exp (x ^ 2) * (2 * x) by ring]
    exact h.exp
  · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
    continuity
